description: CompositionPink top made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves, and graphic print on the chestFittingComfortWash careWarm machine wash or hand wash separately in mild detergentDo not bleach or wringDry in shadeMedium iron, but do not iron on printThis easy-to-wear basic top from jealous 21 adds a playful aesthetic to your wardrobe. Show off your fun side in this fashionably tailored top with its whimsical design and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair this with a matching scarf, tonal jacket and richly hued denims.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'8' and chest 33"
